name: explicit release build
prompt: Build srsRAN Project release_25_10 in .local/ocudu using the Skillful RAN container path.

name: project clone and build
prompt: Clone the official srsRAN Project repo and compile the OCUDU-aligned RAN stack for this workspace.

name: clean rebuild
prompt: Run a clean Docker-based rebuild of the pinned srsRAN Project source tree.

name: dry run build plan
prompt: Plan the srsRAN Project build commands before changing anything.

name: negative readiness
prompt: Check whether Docker is usable and whether this PC has enough disk and RAM.

name: negative srsue build
prompt: Build srsUE from the srsRAN 4G repo for the ZMQ lane.

name: negative open5gs core
prompt: Bring up the pinned Open5GS core containers and check their health.

name: negative packaging
prompt: Review scratch files and promote them into a tracked skill.
